channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Junction of Rochester Road and Kentish Town Road, 28th March
item.description:
Lime scooters dumped on the pavement and in a clearly marked disabled bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Rochester Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin missing, 28th March
item.description:
We had 3 large bins, today all went missing. Now only 2 have been replaced
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter here has been left, 28th March
item.description:
Please collect, empty bottles, cardboard boxes, tissues
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London

item.title: Litter on road needs collecting, 28th March
item.description:
Please collect
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London

item.title: Flat screen TV dumped here, 28th March
item.description:
Please collect
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tipping and litter, 28th March
item.description:
More fly tipping and litter on Osbaldeston Road including a stack of mattresses

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London

Cardboard

item.title: Cardboard box, wood, plastic pipe, 27th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Landor Road, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Dangerous obstruction to Public foot path, 27th March
item.description:
As a matter of urgency Please can you have this removed as I hurt myself on the scaffold poles whilst walking through this footpath , there are no signs up pre warning you about the danger ahead when you enter this public right of way , thank you .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cleveleys Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working Lansdowne Gardens SW8 2EG, 27th March
item.description:
Very dark/dangerous due to street light not working.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lansdowne Gardens, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stop Line Has Faded, 27th March
item.description:
The stop lines, pedestrians studs and zig-zags have faded on both approaches.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Botolph Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess left on pavement, 27th March
item.description:
Dog mess left on pavement around 5-5:30 pm today by the wall on pavement outside 62 Woodhurst ave
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodhurst Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near a car park, 27th March
item.description:
This furniture has been here for a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Queen's Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Car left Abandoned, 27th March
item.description:
The vehicle hasn’t moved for over a month. It has a flat tyre and has bags of rubbish inside.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensworth Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oblong slab of pavement had become extensively elevated compared to surrounding pavement within previous 24 hours, 27th March
item.description:
Issue has developed rapidly within 24 hours

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Way, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Found used Clthes thrown away., 27th March
item.description:
Bin area seems polluted by used clothes need to be clear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page's Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London

item.title: Street sign hit by car and leaning, 27th March
item.description:
Street sign was hit by a car and now leans heavily to the side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Springrice Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large oil spillage, 27th March
item.description:
The is a large oil spillage outside number 58 overton and it is running toward the drain outside number 60, looks like someone has down an oil change but let it drain into the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overton Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned hire bikes blocking the pathway, 27th March
item.description:
Abandoned hire bikes blocking the pathway beside TWG Tea at Whitcomb street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet
